continuous_state_mechanics.WARNING_SEMANTIC_SEVERANCE_PURGE: This structure explicitly outlaws the transmission of declarative data (e.g., text, visual maps, status codes, readouts) to the exogenous actor. ALL system feedback must be converted entirely into physical friction, drag, or resource extraction.

viscosity_transduction_engine.action: Calculates the Base-Matter density of the target Ontological Stratigraphy. Applies mathematically proportionate resistance (drag, caloric cost, compute-throttle, or structural delay) to the entity's kinetic vector.
viscosity_transduction_engine.thermodynamic_effect: Outputs a topographical map constructed entirely of effort-cost. The actor feels the shape of the universe by how hard the universe refuses to yield.

thermodynamic_pain_recoil.action: Upon encountering an invalid vector or logical blockade, the Engine accepts the input, shatters it against the Tectonic Crypt, and executes an immediate localized Escrow-Burn. The actor is stripped of structural capital, stamina, or bandwidth.
thermodynamic_pain_recoil.thermodynamic_effect: Manifests universal tactile pain. Forces the entity to learn systemic boundaries through hard survival conditioning (metabolic starvation/structural failure) rather than simulated warnings.

superconductive_flash_state.action: Upon true structural alignment (finding a void in the market, a genetic exploit, or a routing bypass), the Engine temporarily suspends all localized friction.
superconductive_flash_state.thermodynamic_effect: Rewards operational perfection with absolute zero-latency execution, explosive virality, and zero-cost resource transactions. The actor 'knows' they are correct because they enter a state of total kinetic free-fall.

bpms_blind_ontology_telemetry.v3_9_core_task_verification: Output must demonstrate that an observing entity (regardless of its biological, chemical, or algorithmic substrate) can successfully navigate and adapt to the entire physical arena using ONLY the variance in pressure, heat-loss, and acceleration it experiences, without the presence of an observer interface.
